patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Gooper, Inter, Roboto Mono.
<AccordionItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, content.
<Alert> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: color, title, children, icon, onClose, className, style.
<Alert> color must be one of 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'brand'.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: src, alt, initials, size, ring, className, style.
<Avatar> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'.
<Badge> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, color, variant, size, className, style.
<Badge> color must be one of 'brand' | 'neutral' | 'success' | 'danger' | 'warning' | 'info' | 'heart'.
<Badge> variant must be one of 'soft' | 'solid'.
<Badge> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md'.
<Banner> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: title, subtitle, cta, onCta, tone, image, className, style.
<Banner> tone must be one of 'brand' | 'cream' | 'heart'.
<BottomNavItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label, icon.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, type, weight, size, fullWidth, disabled, loading, iconLeft, iconRight, onClick, className, style.
<CarameloLogo> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: className, style, blue, icon1.
<CarameloLogo> blue must be one of 'default' | 'dark' | 'blue' | 'white'.
<Card> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, padding, interactive, elevated, onClick, className, style.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, defaultChecked, label, disabled, onChange, id, className, style.
<Chip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, selected, icon, disabled, onClick, className, style.
<CoreSolid> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: className, style.
<Counter> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, min, max, size, onChange, className, style.
<Counter> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md'.
<Divider> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: orientation, className, style.
<Divider> orientation must be one of 'horizontal' | 'vertical'.
<EmptyState> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, title, description, action, className, style.
<Heart> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: className, style, solid.
<HeartSolid> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: className, style.
<Icon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, color, title, className, style.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, type, weight, size, disabled, ariaLabel, onClick, className, style.
<IconButton> type must be one of 'default' | 'danger' | 'neutral'.
<IconButton> weight must be one of 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost'.
<IconButton> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Input> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, defaultValue, placeholder, type, helper, error, disabled, prefix, suffix, onChange, id, className, style.
<Pagination> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: page, total, onChange, className, style.
<PetloveLogo> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: className, style, size, type.
<PetloveLogo> size must be one of 'lg' | 'sm' | 'md'.
<PetloveLogo> type must be one of 'inverse' | 'default'.
<Price> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, original, size, currency, club, className, style.
<Price> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<ProductCard> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: image, brand, title, price, originalPrice, discount, rating, reviews, club, favorite, onToggleFavorite, onAdd, className, style.
<ProgressIndicator> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, variant, size, thickness, indeterminate, className, style.
<ProgressIndicator> variant must be one of 'linear' | 'circular'.
<Radio> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, defaultChecked, label, name, value, disabled, onChange, id, className, style.
<Rating> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, max, size, count, showValue, className, style.
<SearchBar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, placeholder, onChange, onSubmit, size, className, style.
<SearchBar> size must be one of 'md' | 'lg'.
<SegmentOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label.
<SelectOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label.
<Skeleton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: width, height, radius, circle, className, style.
<Snackbar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: message, action, onAction, color, icon, className, style.
<Snackbar> color must be one of 'neutral' | 'success' | 'danger'.
<Stepper> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: steps, current, className, style.
<Switch> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, defaultChecked, label, disabled, onChange, id, className, style.
<TabItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, label.
<Tag> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, color, icon, onRemove, className, style.
<Tag> color must be one of 'neutral' | 'brand' | 'success' | 'danger'.
<Textarea> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, defaultValue, placeholder, rows, helper, error, disabled, onChange, id, className, style.
<Tooltip> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, placement, children, className, style.
<Tooltip> placement must be one of 'top' | 'bottom' | 'left' | 'right'.
